description:
Check my previous reports. How are you not banning a blatant cheater with a clip of me reporting him CLEARLY SHOWING HIS NAME??????? What is this website used for if the only reports that are deemed acceptable completed within an app THAT WILL NOT OPEN OR LOAD WHEN OPENING R6???? Every time I load up R6, reputation.gg app is loaded up before I am met with an infinite circle insinuating that the app is loading before I close it after 5 minutes to save FPS. TabStats as a website fails to find 90% of the playres i report, resulting in me not being able to find the players' names on Reputation.gg/report-a-player to further create a report, thus making it impossible to report a player.

How is it fair that a player like "Swozee" is able to play this game and not be banned for the blatant cheats shown in the following case file:
https://reputation.gg/reports/reported-swozee-for-cheating-by-lcte/4f678fc9-f6a9-48ab-a882-43afdda65601
https://reputation.gg/reports/reported-swozee-for-boosted-by-lcte/4eb2f962-075c-4ac0-aefe-1472eec7a789

Though, he is then allowed to comment the following depicted in the image above.......... 

This website is struggling to entice me to continue reporting players due to it's liabilities when it comes to:
A. Finding the players.
and
B. Admin's feedback upon a blatant hacker being reported.

I am sure I am not the only one who is irritated by the lack of ability to report and ban a player for obviously cheating with the reason being: Report the player through the application (THAT DOES NOT WORK EVER, WHETHER RESTARTED AND RELAUCNHED, MOPENED BEFORE/AFTER R6 IS OPENED OR ANY POSSIBLE FIX KNOWN, ALONG WITH TABSTATS BEING COMPLETELY UNRELIABLE WHEN ATTEMPTING TO FIND A PLAYER WITH THE IN-GAME NAME BEING KNOWN).

latest_comment.message: The reported account is banned on our system. It is awaiting tabstats to show the tabban.
